# HelpChatbot ŌĆö Implementation Plan

## Problem
Build a Blazor Server web chatbot that answers customer questions about internal product documentation (PDFs stored in a local `Docs/` folder). Uses Postgres (with pgvector) for storage and an LLM via Microsoft.Extensions.AI for generation.

## Architecture (RAG Pipeline)

```
User (Blazor UI) ŌåÆ Chat Service ŌåÆ Embedding query ŌåÆ pgvector similarity search
                                 ŌåÆ Top-K chunks injected into LLM prompt
                                 ŌåÆ Streamed answer back to UI
```

### Technology Choices

| Concern | Choice | Rationale |
|---------|--------|-----------|
| UI | Blazor Server (Interactive SSR) | Real-time streaming, single project, C# end-to-end |
| LLM abstraction | `Microsoft.Extensions.AI` (`IChatClient`) | Provider-agnostic; no agentic loops needed ŌĆö single promptŌåÆresponse with context |
| LLM provider | `OpenAI` NuGet (swappable) | Most common; user can swap to Azure.AI.OpenAI or OllamaSharp |
| Embeddings | `IEmbeddingGenerator<string, Embedding<float>>` via MEAI | Same abstraction layer, provider-swappable |
| Vector store | `Microsoft.Extensions.VectorData` + Npgsql pgvector provider | Postgres already chosen; pgvector adds vector similarity search |
| PDF parsing | `PdfPig` | .NET-native, no native dependencies, extracts text from PDFs |
| Document ingestion | Custom ingestion service at startup | Reads PDFs from `Docs/`, chunks by paragraphs, embeds, upserts into pgvector |
| Relational data | EF Core + Npgsql | Chat history, conversation metadata in Postgres |

### Key NuGet Packages

- `Microsoft.Extensions.AI` ŌĆö IChatClient / IEmbeddingGenerator abstractions
- `Microsoft.Extensions.AI.OpenAI` ŌĆö OpenAI provider wiring
- `OpenAI` ŌĆö underlying OpenAI SDK
- `Microsoft.Extensions.VectorData.Abstractions` ŌĆö vector store abstraction
- `Npgsql.EntityFrameworkCore.PostgreSQL` ŌĆö EF Core Postgres provider
- `UglyToad.PdfPig` ŌĆö PDF text extraction
- `Microsoft.Extensions.VectorData.Npgsql` ŌĆö pgvector MEVD connector (community/preview)

## Todos

### 1. Project setup & packages
Add all NuGet packages; configure `appsettings.json` with Postgres connection string and AI settings (API key placeholder via user-secrets).

### 2. Data models
- `DocumentChunk` ŌĆö vector store record (Id, Text, Embedding, SourceFile, PageNumber)
- `ChatConversation` / `ChatMessage` ŌĆö EF Core entities for chat history

### 3. EF Core DbContext + migrations
`ChatDbContext` with `ChatConversation` and `ChatMessage` tables. Postgres connection via config.

### 4. PDF ingestion service
`DocumentIngestionService` (hosted service):
- Scans `Docs/` folder for PDFs
- Extracts text with PdfPig, chunks by paragraphs (~500 tokens each)
- Generates embeddings via `IEmbeddingGenerator`
- Upserts chunks into pgvector via MEVD

### 5. RAG retrieval service
`RetrievalService`:
- Embeds the user query
- Searches pgvector for top-5 similar chunks (min score threshold 0.75)
- Returns ranked chunks with source attribution

### 6. Chat service
`ChatService`:
- Accepts user question + conversation ID
- Calls `RetrievalService` to get relevant context
- Builds system prompt with context chunks + source references
- Calls `IChatClient.GetStreamingResponseAsync` for streamed response
- Persists messages to Postgres via EF Core

### 7. Blazor UI
- `Components/Pages/Chat.razor` ŌĆö main chat page with message history, input box, streaming response display
- `Components/Layout/` ŌĆö minimal layout with nav
- CSS styling for chat bubbles, loading indicator

### 8. DI registration & Program.cs
Wire up all services: EF Core, IChatClient, IEmbeddingGenerator, vector store, ingestion, retrieval, chat service. Configure Blazor Server.

### 9. Configuration & secrets
- `appsettings.json` ŌĆö connection string, model names, Docs folder path
- User-secrets for API key (never in committed config)

## Guardrails Applied
- **Temperature = 0** for factual Q&A
- **MaxOutputTokens** set explicitly
- **Streaming** for time-to-first-token
- **Relevance threshold** (0.75) to avoid injecting irrelevant chunks
- **Source attribution** in every response
- **No hardcoded secrets** ŌĆö user-secrets / env vars only
- **Retry logic** via MEAI pipeline

## Notes
- The PDF `product-guide.pdf` already exists in `Docs/`
- pgvector extension must be enabled in Postgres (`CREATE EXTENSION vector`)
- Ingestion runs once at startup; re-ingests only new/changed files
- Project targets .NET 10.0 (already configured)

## Architecture (RAG Pipeline)

```
User (Blazor UI) ŌåÆ Chat Service ŌåÆ Embedding query ŌåÆ pgvector similarity search
                                 ŌåÆ Top-K chunks injected into LLM prompt
                                 ŌåÆ Streamed answer back to UI
```

### Technology Choices

| Concern | Choice | Rationale |
|---------|--------|-----------|
| UI | Blazor Server (Interactive SSR) | Real-time streaming, single project, C# end-to-end |
| LLM abstraction | `Microsoft.Extensions.AI` (`IChatClient`) | Provider-agnostic; no agentic loops needed ŌĆö single promptŌåÆresponse with context |

# HelpChatbot ŌĆö Implementation Plan

## Problem
Build a Blazor Server web chatbot that answers customer questions about internal product documentation (PDFs stored in a local `Docs/` folder). Uses Postgres (with pgvector) for storage and an LLM via Microsoft.Extensions.AI for generation.

## Architecture (RAG Pipeline)

```
User (Blazor UI) ŌåÆ Chat Service ŌåÆ Embedding query ŌåÆ pgvector similarity search
                                 ŌåÆ Top-K chunks injected into LLM prompt
                                 ŌåÆ Streamed answer back to UI
```

### Technology Choices

| Concern | Choice | Rationale |
|---------|--------|-----------|
| UI | Blazor Server (Interactive SSR) | Real-time streaming, single project, C# end-to-end |
| LLM abstraction | `Microsoft.Extensions.AI` (`IChatClient`) | Provider-agnostic; no agentic loops needed ŌĆö single promptŌåÆresponse with context |
| LLM provider | `OpenAI` NuGet (swappable) | Most common; user can swap to Azure.AI.OpenAI or OllamaSharp |
| Embeddings | `IEmbeddingGenerator<string, Embedding<float>>` via MEAI | Same abstraction layer, provider-swappable |
| Vector store | `Microsoft.Extensions.VectorData` + Npgsql pgvector provider | Postgres already chosen; pgvector adds vector similarity search |
| PDF parsing | `PdfPig` | .NET-native, no native dependencies, extracts text from PDFs |
| Document ingestion | Custom ingestion service at startup | Reads PDFs from `Docs/`, chunks by paragraphs, embeds, upserts into pgvector |
| Relational data | EF Core + Npgsql | Chat history, conversation metadata in Postgres |

### Key NuGet Packages

- `Microsoft.Extensions.AI` ŌĆö IChatClient / IEmbeddingGenerator abstractions
- `Microsoft.Extensions.AI.OpenAI` ŌĆö OpenAI provider wiring
- `OpenAI` ŌĆö underlying OpenAI SDK
- `Microsoft.Extensions.VectorData.Abstractions` ŌĆö vector store abstraction
- `Npgsql.EntityFrameworkCore.PostgreSQL` ŌĆö EF Core Postgres provider
- `UglyToad.PdfPig` ŌĆö PDF text extraction
- `Microsoft.Extensions.VectorData.Npgsql` ŌĆö pgvector MEVD connector (community/preview)

## Todos

### 1. Project setup & packages
Add all NuGet packages; configure `appsettings.json` with Postgres connection string and AI settings (API key placeholder via user-secrets).

### 2. Data models
- `DocumentChunk` ŌĆö vector store record (Id, Text, Embedding, SourceFile, PageNumber)
- `ChatConversation` / `ChatMessage` ŌĆö EF Core entities for chat history

### 3. EF Core DbContext + migrations
`ChatDbContext` with `ChatConversation` and `ChatMessage` tables. Postgres connection via config.

### 4. PDF ingestion service
`DocumentIngestionService` (hosted service):
- Scans `Docs/` folder for PDFs
- Extracts text with PdfPig, chunks by paragraphs (~500 tokens each)
- Generates embeddings via `IEmbeddingGenerator`
- Upserts chunks into pgvector via MEVD

### 5. RAG retrieval service
`RetrievalService`:
- Embeds the user query
- Searches pgvector for top-5 similar chunks (min score threshold 0.75)
- Returns ranked chunks with source attribution

### 6. Chat service
`ChatService`:
- Accepts user question + conversation ID
- Calls `RetrievalService` to get relevant context
- Builds system prompt with context chunks + source references
- Calls `IChatClient.GetStreamingResponseAsync` for streamed response
- Persists messages to Postgres via EF Core

### 7. Blazor UI
- `Components/Pages/Chat.razor` ŌĆö main chat page with message history, input box, streaming response display
- `Components/Layout/` ŌĆö minimal layout with nav
- CSS styling for chat bubbles, loading indicator

### 8. DI registration & Program.cs
Wire up all services: EF Core, IChatClient, IEmbeddingGenerator, vector store, ingestion, retrieval, chat service. Configure Blazor Server.

### 9. Configuration & secrets
- `appsettings.json` ŌĆö connection string, model names, Docs folder path
- User-secrets for API key (never in committed config)

## Guardrails Applied
- **Temperature = 0** for factual Q&A
- **MaxOutputTokens** set explicitly
- **Streaming** for time-to-first-token
- **Relevance threshold** (0.75) to avoid injecting irrelevant chunks
- **Source attribution** in every response
- **No hardcoded secrets** ŌĆö user-secrets / env vars only
- **Retry logic** via MEAI pipeline

## Notes
- The PDF `product-guide.pdf` already exists in `Docs/`
- pgvector extension must be enabled in Postgres (`CREATE EXTENSION vector`)
- Ingestion runs once at startup; re-ingests only new/changed files
- Project targets .NET 10.0 (already configured)

- `Npgsql.EntityFrameworkCore.PostgreSQL` ŌĆö EF Core Postgres provider
- `UglyToad.PdfPig` ŌĆö PDF text extraction

`ChatDbContext` with ChatConversation and ChatMessage tables. Postgres connection via config.

`DocumentIngestionService` (IHostedService):

- Extracts text with PdfPig, chunks by paragraphs (~500 tokens each)

- Upserts chunks into pgvector via MEVD

`RetrievalService`:

- Accepts user question + conversation ID

- Builds system prompt with context chunks + source references

- Persists messages to Postgres via EF Core

### 7. Blazor UI
- `Components/Pages/Chat.razor` ŌĆö chat page with message history, input, streaming display
- `Components/Layout/` ŌĆö minimal layout
- CSS for chat bubbles and loading indicator

Wire up: EF Core, IChatClient, IEmbeddingGenerator, vector store, ingestion, retrieval, chat service. Configure Blazor Server.

### 9. Configuration & secrets
- appsettings.json ŌĆö connection string, model names, Docs folder path
- User-secrets for API key (never in committed config)

- **MaxOutputTokens** set explicitly
- **Streaming** for time-to-first-token
- **Relevance threshold** (0.75) to filter low-quality chunks
- **Source attribution** in every response

- Ingestion runs once at startup; re-ingests only new/changed files
- Project targets .NET 10.0
